remarks.zh: 窗户制作的多行输出示例。根据需要调整偏移。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Example of multi-line output for window fabrication. Adjust offsets as needed.
remarks.ms: Contoh output berbilang baris untuk pembuatan tingkap. Sesuaikan offset seperti yang diperlukan. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Contoh keluaran multi-baris untuk pembuatan jendela. Sesuaikan offset sesuai kebutuhan. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: ตัวอย่างผลลัพธ์หลายบรรทัดสำหรับการผลิตหน้าต่าง ปรับการเยื้องตามที่จำเป็น (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Ví dụ về đầu ra nhiều dòng để chế tạo cửa sổ. Điều chỉnh độ lệch theo nhu cầu. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Halimbawa ng multi-line output para sa paggawa ng bintana. Ayusin ang mga offset kung kinakailangan. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ပြတင်းမှန် ထုတ်ရန် အများကြီး output များကို ဖန်တီးခြင်းနမူနာ ။ Offset ကိုလိုအပ်သလိုညှိပါ။( AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គំរូនៃលទ្ធផល​ច្រើនបន្ទាត់​សម្រាប់ការ​ផលិត​បង្អួច។ កែសម្រួល offset ដោយយោងទៅតាម​តម្រូវការ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຕົວຢ່າງຜົນຈັດລຽງຂອງລາຍລະອຽດ construction. i adjustment (AI translated, plok louder verbal.)
